name: ALEXANDERS INC
summary: Alexander's, Inc. (ALX) is a Delaware-incorporated REIT managed by Vornado Realty Trust. The company owns five New York City properties totaling approximately 2.5 million square feet, including 731 Lexington Avenue (leased entirely to Bloomberg for office space), Rego Park I and II shopping centers, a Flushing retail building subleased to New World Mall LLC, and The Alexander apartment tower with 312 residential units.
